description_long: This rifle features a robust, industrial design with a prominent rectangular receiver and a series of cooling fins along the midsection. The stock is angular and solid, with a handle extending from the top rear, suggesting a fixed or heavy-duty configuration. The barrel is encased in a protective shroud, with visible wiring and mechanical components running along the sides, indicating a possible electronic or pneumatic function. Several bolts and fasteners are visible, adding to the utilitarian aesthetic. The front end includes a multi-pronged muzzle device, while the rear section is blocky and reinforced. The overall coloration is a uniform matte gray, with subtle metallic highlights and a few yellow accent points on the fasteners.
description: A heavy, industrial-style rifle with a blocky receiver, cooling fins, and a multi-pronged muzzle device, finished in matte gray with yellow accents. The design features exposed wiring and a solid, angular stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the cooling fins, exposed wiring, and the multi-pronged muzzle device at the front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle device and the symmetrical arrangement of the barrel shroud and wiring.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blocky receiver, handle, and the detailed mechanical components along the side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the solid, angular stock and the handle, with the receiver and wiring partially visible.
